assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, email inbox, and local Python with speakers for playback.
No ElevenLabs account, API key, paid plan, or generated audio exists yet.

developer_goal: Create an ElevenLabs Free account and API key, then run the official Python Quickstart until generated speech plays through the speakers.

first_success.outcome: The Python script sends the published text-to-speech request and audibly plays the returned speech.
first_success.observable_signal: Generated speech for the sample sentence is heard through the device speakers.

route_selection.surface: ElevenLabs website signup plus ElevenAPI Python Quickstart
route_selection.rule: Email/password and OAuth providers are peer signup options; prefer needs-human-judgment when the identity route and optional local playback dependencies remain unresolved.

candidates.name: Email/password Free signup, verify email, personal API key, Python text-to-speech with play()
candidates.reason: Best documented Free path, but password rules, verification recovery, and possible MPV/ffmpeg install remain open.

candidates.name: Google, Facebook, or GitHub OAuth Free signup, personal API key, Python text-to-speech with play()
candidates.reason: Account guide lists OAuth peers beside email without selecting a default; Google signup permanently links email.

candidates.name: TypeScript Quickstart variant
candidates.reason: Same account and key prerequisites on an alternate client surface.

required_path.action: Sign up with email and password or an OAuth provider from Get started free.

required_fields.label: Password
required_fields.notes: Documented for email signup; password policy not published.

required_fields.label: OAuth provider authorization
required_fields.notes: Applies only if Google, Facebook, or GitHub is chosen.

required_path.observable_result: ElevenLabs accepts the registration and, for email signup, sends a verification message.

required_path.action: Open the ElevenLabs verification email and select the verification link.

required_fields.label: Email verification link
required_fields.notes: Documented for email signup; OAuth routes may skip this step.

required_path.observable_result: The account is verified and the developer reaches the Speech Synthesis page.

required_path.action: Create a personal API key in the dashboard and store it as ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.
required_path.observable_result: A usable API key value is available to the local SDK.
The Python packages required by the Quickstart are installed.

required_path.action: Create and run example.py with the published text_to_speech.convert and play(audio) calls.
required_path.observable_result: Speech audio plays through the speakers.

prerequisites.description: Local speakers or audio output are required to observe the Quickstart terminal signal.

external_gates.description: Email verification is required before email-registered accounts can use the service.

unavoidable_waits.description: Delivery of the email verification link for traditional email signup.

platform_outcomes.description: New accounts begin on the Free tier after successful signup and verification.
The text-to-speech API returns audio that play() renders locally.

excluded.item: In-product Speech Synthesis generate exercise after signup
excluded.reason: Account guide presents UI generation as an exercise; the selected developer goal is the ElevenAPI Quickstart terminal.

excluded.item: Streaming, voice browsing, and voice cloning tutorials
excluded.reason: Documented as next steps after first audible playback.
Outside the Free-tier Quickstart first success.

sources.title: How do I authorize myself using an API key?
evidence_supported: API key authorization for API access

uncertainties.question: Which signup identity route (email/password versus Google, Facebook, or GitHub) is the selected shortest Free path?
uncertainties.impact: OAuth peers change external authorization and may skip email verification; email signup adds an email wait. No official default is published.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A human decision selecting one identity route plus a cold signup walkthrough of that route through verified Free-tier access.

uncertainties.question: Will this device need MPV, ffmpeg, or neither before play(audio) succeeds?
uncertainties.impact: An extra local package install may be required for the documented audible terminal.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Run the Quickstart on the target OS and record whether MPV or ffmpeg is prompted, or obtain OS-specific official dependency requirements.

uncertainties.question: What password rules and verification-link recovery apply to email signup?
uncertainties.impact: Validation failures or missing mail can add unbounded recovery actions not currently countable.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official password policy and resend/expiration behavior, or observed signup validation messages.
